titleStmt.title: SII 34.235: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 235. Tiruvēngavāsal, Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa, in front of the central shrine in the Vyāghrapurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Piḷḷaiyār Aḻagapperumāḷ who was the holder of the nāḍu endowed some land for offerings to the image of Chandraśēcharadēva set up by him when his superior officer of the (nāḍu-piḍitta) Chēra-Pāṇḍyadēva made the revenue settlement of the locality (nāḍukaḷukku ichaiya aṟudi paṇṇi).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOmāṟa paṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ cOṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatEvaṟku yāṇṭu
jēyaciṅka kulakāla vaḷanāṭṭu peruvāyal nāṭṭuc celvikuṭiyil muṉṉāḷ Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkup patiṉoṉṟāvatu mārkaḻi mātattu Iṉṉāṭṭukkāva
rumpāḻi yaraiyaṉ perumāḷ tirua yāṉāṉa kiṭārattaraiyar Ivvūril ceyta pa paṇpukku Iṉṉāṭuṭaiya
piḷḷaiyār Aḻakapperumāḷ kīḻ nāṭu piṭitta tēvar cērapāṇṭiya tēvar caṉṉitiyilē tēvar nāṭukaḷukku Icaiya Aṟutipaṇṇi Iṉṉāṭṭu
Uṭaiyār tiruvēṅkaivāyiluṭaiya Eḻunāṭṭu nāyaṉār kōyililē cantiracēkara tēvarāṉa
tēvap perumāḷaiyum Eḻuntaruḷivittu Ittēvaṟkuc cantirātittaval Amutupaṭi cella Ic celvakuṭi
cērapāṇṭiyanallūr Akavayalil peruṅkuḷattupperuṅkumuḻiyāl nīrpāyntu viḷaiyum Ivvaya
l naṭuvil vākkālukkum mēṟku muṉpu Iṉṉāyaṉār paḻantēvatāṉamāṉa kuṭi nīṅkiya tēvatāṉa nilam
nilam Oru māvum nīkki Eḻumānilam kaṇṭañcēra viṭṭut tiru
ccūlakkal nāṭṭikkuṭuttu Innilam Eḻumāvukkum nāṭṭu
ṭaṉpaṭi nāṭṭu marakkālāṟ kaṭamai Aḷakkavum nāṭupaṭu kuṭimai
Iṟukkak kaṭavatu .
Digital edition of SII 34.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
